use_cases: Audio mixing applications requiring precise volume or parameter adjustments
Video editing software with rotatory controls for effects and filters
3D modeling tools for adjusting object properties like rotation or scale
Hardware simulation interfaces in dev-tools or IoT dashboards
Music production DAW interfaces with synthesizer parameter controls
ai_summary: A physics-based rotary knob input control with spring animations that provides tactile feedback through stiffness, damping, and mass parameters. Features real-time visual feedback with light opacity and blur effects that respond to rotation, creating a reactor-style futuristic aesthetic. Supports pointer-based drag interactions for desktop and mobile platforms.
